AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.title: Oracle Tablet
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC.descriptio: At end of turn, Piety decays by 1 instead of 2. When using Oracle at 0 Piety, the oracle responds as DISPLEASED instead of ANGERED.
AICARDMOD-ORACLE_TABLET_RELIC_UPGRADED_R: At end of turn, lose 25% of your Piety instead (minimum 1). When using Oracle at 0 Piety, the oracle responds as DISPLEASED instead of ANGERED.
AICARDMOD-PRAYER_BEADS_RELIC.title: Prayer Beads
AICARDMOD-PRAYER_BEADS_RELIC.description: At end of turn, lose 1 less Piety.
AICARDMOD-PRAYER_BEADS_RELIC_UPGRADED_RE: At end of turn, lose 2 less Piety.
